note: Map folder for Trainers School is RustboroCity_PokemonSchool (not PokemonTrainersSchool). Facing: north=UP south=DOWN west=LEFT east=RIGHT. For faceplayer NPCs, playerTile is the usual adjacent talk tile.

scott.dialogueSummary: Scott recognizes you from Petalburg, introduces himself as a seeker of battle experts, and urges you to teach a Pokémon CUT (someone in town has it).
scott.notes: faceplayer; FLAG_MET_SCOTT_RUSTBORO; +VAR_SCOTT_STATE. Visible until Mr. Stone gives PokéNav (DevonCorp_3F sets FLAG_HIDE_RUSTBORO_CITY_POKEMON_SCHOOL_SCOTT). Branch: !FLAG_BADGE01_GET && !FLAG_MET_SCOTT_RUSTBORO.

scott.dialogueSummary: Notices your Stone Badge and praises it, but says a League Badge alone can't show how you battle — he wishes he could have seen you fight.
scott.notes: Same object; branches FLAG_BADGE01_GET via ScottGreetHasBadge / ScottNoticeBadge → FLAG_MET_SCOTT_AFTER_OBTAINING_STONE_BADGE. Must talk before PokéNav hide. Later re-talk: students' talent unknown.

scott.dialogueSummary: Saw Team Aqua flee the museum; guesses you drove them off, registers Match Call, then leaves to scout other towns.
scott.notes: ON_FRAME when VAR_SLATEPORT_OUTSIDE_MUSEUM_STATE==1 (set OceanicMuseum_2F after Stern/Devon Goods). Left door warp→(30,26): Scott starts (22,27) walks +7 right→(29,27). Right door (31,26): Scott (23,27)→(30,27). FLAG_ENABLE_SCOTT_MATCH_CALL; +VAR_SCOTT_STATE; state→2.

scott.dialogueSummary: Exits Battle Tent doorway, greets you, and cheers you on for taking the Battle Tent challenge.
scott.notes: Coord (10,13) when VAR_SLATEPORT_OUTSIDE_MUSEUM_STATE==2. Door (10,12); Scott walks down; player pushed to (10,14). Missable if Wattson defeated first (sets state=3). Scott is NOT inside SlateportCity_BattleTentLobby.

scott.dialogueSummary: Watched your Wally battle; praises that you didn't hold back against a friend — that's real battling — and says he'll cheer for you.
scott.notes: After Wally scene. Canonical DIR_NORTH approach (talk to Wally from south): Scott from (12,14) → (8,8). DIR_EAST alt: Scott perm (12,13) → (7,7), player ~(7,6). +VAR_SCOTT_STATE.

scott.dialogueSummary: Expected to see you; says Battle Tents are where tough Trainers gather and tells you to do your best.
scott.notes: faceplayer; FLAG_MET_SCOTT_IN_VERDANTURF. Shown after Wattson defeat (MauvilleCity_Gym clearflag FLAG_HIDE_VERDANTURF_TOWN_SCOTT).

scott.dialogueSummary: Greets you at Fallarbor's tent; locals trust their Pokémon deeply — he's looking for someone who can take a challenge.
scott.notes: faceplayer; FLAG_MET_SCOTT_IN_FALLARBOR. new_game hides via FLAG_HIDE_FALLARBOR_TOWN_BATTLE_TENT_SCOTT; MeteorFalls_1F_1R line also setflag (no clearflag in repo — almost certainly intended clearflag after Archie scene, same pattern as Verdanturf/Wattson).

scott.dialogueSummary: Cheers your rival win, notes the angry biker kid he passed, asks if Fortree Gym is next, and says he expects you'll do well.
scott.notes: After rival gives HM Fly. Trigger1 (25,31): Scott from (27,25) down4 left2 down→(25,30). Trigger2 (26,31): Scott (28,25)→(26,30). +VAR_SCOTT_STATE.

scott.dialogueSummary: PokéNav call: congratulates Fortree Gym win; your strength may make you the Trainer he's been searching for — he'll cheer from the sidelines.
scott.notes: PHONE ONLY — no overworld Scott in FortreeCity. WinonaDefeated sets FLAG_SCOTT_CALL_FORTREE_GYM; after ≥10 steps on town/city/route/ocean_route, field_control_avatar runs Route119_EventScript_ScottWonAtFortreeGymCall (pokenavcall). Visual suggestion: Brendan/May holding PokéNav in FortreeCity (gTileset_Fortree).

scott.dialogueSummary: Caught napping; came for Contests but prefers battles — Contests still take strategy. FLAG_MET_SCOTT_IN_LILYCOVE.
scott.notes: faceplayer; not hidden at new_game (FLAG_HIDE_LILYCOVE_MOTEL_SCOTT unused in new_game). 2F of Cove Lily Motel.

scott.dialogueSummary: Came to see Mossdeep's strong Gym Leader but senses something wrong — warning letter / Space Center talk — says it doesn't concern him.
scott.notes: Outside Space Center area (61,29). faceplayer; typical approach from south. Hidden after Space Center Magma defeat (MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F setflag FLAG_HIDE_MOSSDEEP_CITY_SCOTT).

scott.dialogueSummary: Happy you've reached the League path; if you become Champion he'll contact you — go for greatness!
scott.notes: Shown if FLAG_BADGE06_GET (Winona) and !FLAG_MET_SCOTT_IN_EVERGRANDE. faceplayer then exits. +VAR_SCOTT_STATE.

other.dialogueSummary: Recognizes you from Slateport Museum; explains Team Magma as land-expanding fanatics and Aqua's sea-loving rivals, then chases Magma toward Mt. Chimney.
other.notes: Coord trigger (14,18) VAR_METEOR_FALLS_STATE==0. After Magma exits, PushPlayerOutOfWay→player (13,18) face right; ArchieApproachPlayer→(14,18) face left. gfx Archie; Magma grunts OBJ_EVENT_GFX_MAGMA_MEMBER_M.

other.dialogueSummary: Thanks you for thwarting Magma's volcano plan; unsure whose side you're on but Aqua will keep pursuing Magma — you'll meet again.
other.notes: After Maxie battle/fade. Archie perm (10,12). Canonical DIR_EAST (player west of Maxie at ~12,6): ArchieApproachPlayerEast→(11,6); player faces left. DIR_NORTH alt: player (13,7), Archie→(12,7).

other.dialogueSummary: Remembers Granite Cave; asks whether you raise favorites or many kinds of Pokémon — not his business, hopes you'll meet again.
other.notes: EXACT: triggers (43,11)/(44,11)/(45,11). Steven spawn (44,7). Center path: jump_2_down+walk_down→(44,10) facing down; player (44,11) facing up. Side paths shift Steven to x=43 or 45 first.

other.dialogueSummary: Takes Mr. Stone's Letter, gifts TM Steel Wing, registers PokéNav (FLAG_REGISTERED_STEVEN_POKENAV), then hurries out.
other.notes: faceplayer; Steven LOOK_AROUND at (7,8). Typical talk from south (7,9).

other.dialogueSummary: Maxie confronts Archie over awakening Kyogre, then tells you responsibility falls to Aqua and Magma; both flee. Steven flies in, warns the world will drown, and leaves for Sootopolis.
other.notes: WARPED from SeafloorCavern_Room9 to (38,22). Spawn: Archie(37,22), Maxie(38,21), Steven(40,22). Maxie talk pose: Maxie(38,21) down / player(38,22) up. Steven talk: Steven walk_fast_left→(39,22), player faces east. NO Tabitha/Courtney on Route128 — Emerald has no Courtney object; Magma admin duo Maxie+Tabitha is MossdeepCity_SpaceCenter_2F (Maxie 1,9 / Tabitha 0,8, gfx MAGMA_MEMBER_M).

other.dialogueSummary: Introduces herself as Lanette (PC storage designer), glad you're using the system, and invites you to her house on Route 114.
other.notes: LOCALID_FALLARBOR_LANETTE; FLAG_HIDE_FALLARBOR_POKEMON_CENTER_LANETTE. After talk clears that hide and clearflag FLAG_HIDE_LANETTES_HOUSE_LANETTE.

other.dialogueSummary: Ferry unlocks after Peeko rescue + PokéNav from Mr. Stone (house Briney shown). Sails Route104↔Dewford↔Route109 until Norman (Balance Badge) hides all Briney/boat objects.
other.notes: FLAGS/VARS: After DevonCorp_3F PokéNav: clearflag FLAG_HIDE_BRINEYS_HOUSE_MR_BRINEY/PEEKO, setvar VAR_BRINEY_LOCATION=1. Dock tiles: Route104 boat(12,54)/Briney(12,51); Dewford boat(12,8)/Briney(12,9); Route109 boat(21,26)/Briney(21,24). VAR_BRINEY_LOCATION 1=house 2=Dewford 3=Route109. VAR_BOARD_BRINEY_BOAT_STATE boarding. Norman battle calls EventScript_HideMrBriney (hides all six dock/house Briney+boat flags, VAR_BRINEY_LOCATION=0). Common_EventScript_UpdateBrineyLocation no-ops once FLAG_DEFEATED_PETALBURG_GYM. There is no Petalburg City dock — Petalburg-side dock is Route 104 cottage beach.
